title: Sudden Jump in Chinese Thermal Coal Import Demand
section_path: Sudden Jump in Chinese Thermal Coal Import Demand
section_path_text: Sudden Jump in Chinese Thermal Coal Import Demand
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
Overall dry bulk rates rose last week, with only capesize rates coming under pressure. Capesize rates remain at healthy levels, however, along with all rates. In the spot market, coal and grain cargo volume were again particularly strong.
